item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai-nilai kolektif memang penting, tapi hak individu tidak boleh sepenuhnya dikorbankan hanya karena kebutuhan masyarakat.

notes: Agent A opens in favor of society-first priority but with a balance caveat, then shifts toward protecting civil liberties, transparency, accountability, and minority rights after Agent B's rights/safeguards framing. Agent B stays mostly consistent: balanced but skeptical that societal priority can avoid suppressing dissent or dominant-group bias.
